description: Create comprehensive motif alignment and chaperone machinery scorecard figure
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(16, 12), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1, 1, 1.5]})

# Panel A: Motif alignment at phosphate loop
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_title('A. HSP70 Phosphate-Binding Loop Motif Comparison', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', loc='left')

positions = range(8)
labels_hspa8 = list('IDLGTTYS')
labels_hspa12a = list('VDFGTTSS')

# Color by conservation
colors_match = []
for a, b in zip(labels_hspa8, labels_hspa12a):
    if a == b:
        colors_match.append('#4CAF50')  # green = identical
    elif (a in 'LIVMF' and b in 'LIVMF') or (a in 'DE' and b in 'DE'):
        colors_match.append('#FFC107')  # yellow = conservative
    else:
        colors_match.append('#F44336')  # red = non-conservative

for i, (aa8, aa12, col) in enumerate(zip(labels_hspa8, labels_hspa12a, colors_match)):
    # HSPA8 row
    ax1.text(i, 1, aa8, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold',
             fontfamily='monospace',
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#E8F5E9', edgecolor='#4CAF50', linewidth=1.5))
    # HSPA12A row
    ax1.text(i, 0, aa12, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold',
             fontfamily='monospace',
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#FFEBEE' if col == '#F44336' else '#E8F5E9' if col == '#4CAF50' else '#FFF8E1',
                       edgecolor=col, linewidth=1.5))
    # Conservation marker
    if aa8 == aa12:
        ax1.text(i, 0.5, '|', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=12, color='#4CAF50')
    elif col == '#FFC107':
        ax1.text(i, 0.5, ':', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=12, color='#FFC107')
    else:
        ax1.text(i, 0.5, '✗', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=12, color='#F44336', fontweight='bold')

ax1.text(-0.8, 1, 'HSPA8\n(pos 9-16)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(-0.8, 0, 'HSPA12A\n(pos 61-68)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='#F44336')
ax1.text(8.5, 0.5, 'L→F change at\ncritical position 3', ha='left', va='center', fontsize=9, 
         color='#F44336', style='italic')
ax1.set_xlim(-1.5, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(-0.5, 1.8)
ax1.axis('off')

# Panel B: ATPase catalytic motif
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title('B. HSP70 ATPase Catalytic Motif Comparison (PROSITE PS00329)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', loc='left')

labels_hspa8_2 = list('IFDLGGGTFDVSIL')
labels_hspa12a_2 = list('YVVVDSGGGTVDLT')

for i, (aa8, aa12) in enumerate(zip(labels_hspa8_2, labels_hspa12a_2)):
    if aa8 == aa12:
        col = '#4CAF50'
    elif (aa8 in 'LIVMF' and aa12 in 'LIVMF'):
        col = '#FFC107'
    else:
        col = '#F44336'
    
    ax2.text(i, 1, aa8, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold',
             fontfamily='monospace',
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', facecolor='#E8F5E9', edgecolor='#4CAF50', linewidth=1.5))
    ax2.text(i, 0, aa12, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold',
             fontfamily='monospace',
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', 
                       facecolor='#FFEBEE' if col == '#F44336' else '#E8F5E9' if col == '#4CAF50' else '#FFF8E1',
                       edgecolor=col, linewidth=1.5))
    if aa8 == aa12:
        ax2.text(i, 0.5, '|', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, color='#4CAF50')
    elif col == '#FFC107':
        ax2.text(i, 0.5, ':', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, color='#FFC107')
    else:
        ax2.text(i, 0.5, '✗', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, color='#F44336')

ax2.text(-0.8, 1, 'HSPA8\n(pos 197-210)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(-0.8, 0, 'HSPA12A\n(pos 313-326)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='#F44336')
ax2.text(14.5, 0.5, 'Only 2/14 positions\nidentical (GG core)\nDLGGG→DSGGG', ha='left', va='center', 
         fontsize=9, color='#F44336', style='italic')
ax2.set_xlim(-1.5, 18)
ax2.set_ylim(-0.5, 1.8)
ax2.axis('off')

# Panel C: Summary scorecard
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.set_title('C. HSP70 Chaperone Machinery Assessment Scorecard', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', loc='left')

elements = [
    'PS00297 phosphate loop (IDLGTTNS)',
    'PS00329 ATPase catalytic (DLGGGTFD)',
    'PS01036 HSP70 signature 3',
    'Pfam PF00012 (HSP70 family)',
    'Substrate-binding domain (SBDβ)',
    'Helical lid domain (SBDα)',
    'Interdomain linker (DLLLLD)',
    'Canonical chaperone function'
]

for i, elem in enumerate(elements):
    y_pos = len(elements) - i - 1
    ax3.text(0, y_pos, elem, ha='left', va='center', fontsize=9, fontfamily='monospace')
    # HSPA8 checkmark
    ax3.text(5.5, y_pos, '✓', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, color='#4CAF50', fontweight='bold')
    # HSPA12A X
    ax3.text(7, y_pos, '✗', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, color='#F44336', fontweight='bold')

ax3.text(5.5, len(elements), 'HSPA8', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='#4CAF50')
ax3.text(7, len(elements), 'HSPA12A', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='#F44336')

# Score
ax3.text(9, 4, 'HSPA8:    8/8 ✓', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#4CAF50', va='center')
ax3.text(9, 3, 'HSPA12A:  0/8 ✓', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#F44336', va='center')
ax3.text(9, 1.5, 'Verdict: HSPA12A does NOT\nretain the machinery for\ncanonical HSP70 ATP-dependent\nprotein folding chaperone activity', 
         fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='#B71C1C', va='center',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#FFCDD2', edgecolor='#B71C1C', linewidth=2))

ax3.set_xlim(-0.5, 14)
ax3.set_ylim(-0.5, len(elements) + 0.5)
ax3.axis('off')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/tmp/hspa12a_motif_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Motif analysis figure saved.")
